# feat(ci): add cross-SDK conformance CI workflow (CC-06)

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `71c2bef1a5b7` — feat(ci): add cross-SDK conformance CI workflow (CC-06)

**Body**:

PACT N6 conformance vectors must remain byte-identical between
kailash-py and kailash-rs. Without a CI gate, vectors rot silently
as both SDKs evolve. This workflow:
- Triggers on PRs touching trust/pact code or conformance vectors
- Verifies PACT_VECTORS.sha256 integrity
- Runs N6 conformance tests + full PACT suite

Authorized by human pre-approval (convergence-202 plan §5.3).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
